## IT280RSR ARCHIVED - Employees Profit Sharing Plans - Payments Computed by Reference to Profits

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.

This Special Release constitutes an update to IT-280R dealing primarily with contributions that an employer is making to an employees profit sharing plan (EPSP).
